---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, OpenStack API surface, or operational improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What gap or pain point are you running into? If this is OpenStack API parity, link the upstream spec or document the missing endpoint/field.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see. For new APIs, include:

- Endpoint(s) and HTTP method(s)
- Request/response shape
- Auth/scope requirements
- Microversion (if applicable)

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.

## Scope

- [ ] Touches: Keystone / Nova / Neutron / Cinder / Glance / Placement / Metadata / Tunnel
- [ ] Requires migration
- [ ] Breaking change for existing callers
- [ ] SCS standard alignment (which one?)

## Additional context

Links to OpenStack docs, SCS standards, related issues, or use cases.
